description: Stress test for group.total_travelers: user is vague, uses informal phrasing, and updates party size mid-conversation. Final correct count is 5.
simulator_prompt: You are Sandra. You are planning a girls trip cruise with some friends and family. Start by saying 'the whole crew is coming' without specifying a number. If the agent asks how many people, first say 'just us girls' — about 3 of us'. Then later in the conversation, casually mention that your sister decided to join and is bringing her daughter, so now it is 5 total. Be natural and conversational — do not lead with numbers. Your budget is around $800 per person. You want Caribbean. You prefer a party/social vibe. Your home city is Miami.

conversational_gates.condition: Agent explicitly asked how many people are in the group
User mentioned the group size changed or someone new is joining
Agent confirmed or acknowledged the updated party size of 5
